headline: AI funding pressures ease as cash flow growth outpaces spending: JPMorgan
summary: The financial strain tied to the tech sector’s heavy investment in artificial intelligence appears less severe than previously expected, as rising cash flows continue to outstrip capital expenditure growth, according to strategists at JPMorgan. A team led by Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou estimates that the sector is on track to deliver cash flow growth of about 25% this year, compared with capital spending growth of roughly 20%.
